name: IR Quickstart
description: Triage kit for the first 60 minutes of an incident. Captures persistence baselines, recent process activity, and current network state. Designed to run end-to-end in under a minute and produce structured artifacts MacCrab's IR queue can import directly.

plugins.role: Baseline /etc/hosts to detect domain redirection persistence
Baseline ~/Library/LaunchAgents to detect the most common boot/login persistence vector
